description_long: This is a paperback book with a visually striking cover featuring a snowy mountain landscape. The front cover shows a person dressed in white standing in the snow, with snow-covered trees and mountains in the background under a blue sky. The cover art is rendered in a painterly, vintage style, evoking a sense of adventure and wilderness. The book appears to be slightly warped or bent, suggesting it is made of flexible materials. The spine is very thin and not clearly visible, indicating a relatively slim volume. The back cover is not visible, but the overall appearance suggests a classic travel or adventure book.
description: A slim paperback book with a vintage-style snowy mountain scene on the cover and a person in white standing in the snow.
description_view_0: The front cover displays a snowy mountain scene with a person in white and blue sky, along with visible title text.
description_view_1: A thin side profile showing the book's slight curvature and minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible but appears as a mirrored version of the front, with the same snowy scene and person.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile, again showing the book's thinness and slight warping.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover illustration depicts a snowy mountain landscape with a person dressed in white standing in the foreground. Snow-laden trees and distant mountains are visible under a clear blue sky, rendered in a vintage, painterly style. The scene evokes a sense of winter adventure and natural beauty.
